untranslatable_reason: Signal requires delta-neutral portfolio measurement and options-specific metrics (delta, implied volatility, strike ratios, Christmas tree spread construction) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires monitoring portfolio delta neutrality and underlying price movement expectations relative to specific thresholds that cannot be precisely expressed without options Greeks. Multiple [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders indicate missing parameter definitions.
translation_notes: This is an options strategy signal that fundamentally requires options Greeks (delta, gamma, vega, theta) and options-specific construction rules that are beyond the scope of standard price/technical indicators. The signal describes a complex multi-leg spread strategy (Christmas tree) that requires dynamic portfolio delta management. Attempted approximation using volatility (hvol_20) and price range (atr_14) as proxies for low volatility/minimal movement expectations, but this does not capture the actual delta-neutral mechanics or spread construction logic required.
